archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Archetype 4 (Swiss/Clean Business)

Header.description: Large typography, bold 'BRS' branding, solid surface with no glassmorphism to keep it clean. Generous whitespace around the header.

Cards.description: Big, padded (24px+), white surface with rounded-[20px]. Big Feather/Lucide icons. Subtle shadow. Clear visual hierarchy.

Buttons.description: Deep Blue background, rounded-[16px], large text (text-lg), full width on mobile.

Inputs.description: Large touch targets, rounded-[12px], subtle border, generous padding (16px).

Badges.description: Warm yellow background, bold text, used to highlight numbers like 'upcoming installations'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React Native Expo and expo-router for the app architecture.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements, e.g., 'data-testid="login-button"'.
Focus on modern minimalism: generously spaced layout, clear typography hierarchy, and a strict color palette.
